summary: Milestones | Verify Milestones Page Loads with Calendar Navigation and Game Card Details
gherkin:
When the user clicks on the Milestones tile on the homepage
Then the user should be navigated to the Milestones page
And the page should display:
* A calendar icon with the date format "YYYY-MM-DD"
* Previous and Next arrow icons to navigate between dates
AND a game card for each scheduled game containing:
* Team Names (e.g., "BOS vs TB")
* Game PK
* Venue
* Game Date
* Game Status (e.g., "Scheduled", "In Progress", "Final")
And an "Edit Milestone" button
